channel.title: Embedded on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Embedded on Home

item.title: Hand-rolling SM9 (IBC) Cryptography for 8KB RAM Environments
item.description: A technical deep dive into the 2013-2014 implementation of Identity-Based Cryptography (SM9) on resource-constrained microcontrollers, achieving bank-grade security under 10KB of peak memory.

item.title: USB HID Protocols: Solving the 'Sacrificial Byte' & F&R Challenges
item.description: Designing a custom fragmentation protocol for USB HID and debugging low-level Windows driver quirks that 'swallowed' critical data bytes.
